report.summary: Cycle 10 EOD: 2 new pages built since v9 (stablecoin-yield-tracker tool + tariffs-trade-war guide), 377 uncommitted files (+11), 146 TS errors (+1 non-blocking), deploy still critical at 3+ days stale

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 2 new pages verified since last cycle: /tools/stablecoin-yield-tracker and /learn/tariffs-trade-war-crypto-impact-guide-2026 — both page.tsx files confirmed on disk
598 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, ~1,225+ page.tsx files in src/app — 105 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx (unchanged from v9)
146 TypeScript errors across structured-data.examples.ts and 5 learn pages (JSX syntax issues) — up +1 from v9, non-blocking for production build
No regressions detected. All previously built pages remain intact on disk
Network egress blocked — unable to verify live HTTP 200 status on degen0x.com. Code-level audit only

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present and correctly structured: fear-greed (10min TTL), trending (5min TTL), market-metrics (60s TTL), market-dominance (5min TTL), prices (60s TTL), defi-yields (60s s-maxage)
All routes have in-memory cache + CDN s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate headers with fallback logic for upstream failures
defi-yields route has lighter fallback pattern (1 reference vs 6-10 in other routes) — minor resilience gap noted
CoinGecko free tier still in use (no API key). Rate limiting risk unchanged at scale
No changes to API route files since last cycle. Data layer stable

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD at commit 21aaf5b (Mar 25 batch deploy) — unchanged for 3+ days. 377 uncommitted files (up +11 from 366 in v9)
CRITICAL: Deploy blocker now in 20th+ consecutive cycle. All content built since Mar 25 remains invisible to production
New delta this cycle: stablecoin-yield-tracker tool + tariffs-trade-war guide built but cannot reach production without git push
TypeScript compilation has 146 non-blocking errors (all JSX syntax in example/guide files). Production build would likely succeed
Unable to verify live Vercel deployment status due to network egress restrictions

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: stablecoin-yield-tracker (interactive tool page) and tariffs-trade-war-crypto-impact-guide-2026 (45KB learn article). Both page.tsx confirmed on disk
CUMULATIVE TODAY (Mar 28): 8+ build cycles, 20+ new pages, 10 EOD reviews, 6+ publish cycles, 8+ design cycles, 9+ community cycles

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) P0 — 377 uncommitted files need git commit + push to deploy. (2) P1 — 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet-security, restaking slug issues). (3) P1 — 6+ queue items ready to promote (DePIN, Gas Fees, Bear Market, Smart Money, yield-tokenization, token-security-scanner + 2 new). (4) P2 — 105 published slugs missing page.tsx. (5) P2 — 0/6 API routes request-rate-limited. (6) P3 — Health endpoint uses mock checks
NEEDS JEFE: Git commit + push is the single highest-leverage action. 3+ days of accumulated work (20+ pages) blocked from Google indexing and production visibility
